title: Remove sentinel active-transaction semantics from normal flow
goal: Implement the plan-defined structural no-active representation and remove sentinel active-transaction behavior from normal flow.
scope: Adopt active_tx: null as the structural no-active representation in normal materialized state.
Remove normal-flow sentinel transaction identifiers and sentinel ticket placeholders.
Ensure post-terminal materialization returns to the canonical no-active baseline described in plan.md.
out_of_scope: Historical in-place rewrite of legacy data.
Redefining compatibility behavior beyond bounded handling.
Changing canonical status meanings beyond the no-active baseline described in plan.md.
expected_outputs: Runtime changes that remove normal-flow sentinel active-transaction behavior.
Verification evidence showing no-active state is represented structurally.
A code-to-plan traceability summary for no-active and post-terminal materialization behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Normal canonical behavior does not represent active transaction identity with sentinel values.
No-active materialized state uses active_tx: null and null top-level status/verify_state/commit_state as described in plan.md.
Terminal completion does not leave completed work exposed as resumable active work.
